home.emptySubtitle: Start creating your events on our Sin Envolturas website

camera.permissionMessage: To take photos we need access to the camera. You can enable it in your device settings.
camera.unavailableWebMessage: On the web, the camera depends on the browser and permissions.
camera.openFailedBodySuffix: Check permissions in Settings and try on a physical device (the iOS Simulator has no camera).

auth.verifySubtitle: You should receive an email with your code

onboarding.slide2Title: Create the best challenges for your guests

eventDetail.albumEmpty: There are no photos in this album yet.
eventDetail.albumLikeError: Could not update like. Try again.
eventDetail.cameraPermissionBody: We need camera access to add a photo to the event album.
eventDetail.galleryPermissionMessage: We need access to your photo library so you can pick an image.
eventDetail.addPhotoToAlbum: Add photo to the event album
eventDetail.publicParticipantListBody: Enable this option so your guests can view the full list.
eventDetail.guestListSettingsUpdateError: Could not update guest list settings. Try again.
eventDetail.shareSheetBody: Share this link with your guests so they can quickly access event details.
eventDetail.challengeTypeSheetBody: Create multiple challenges for your guests. You can choose between 2 types:
eventDetail.challengeTypeQuizBody: Invite guests to guess the answer and earn 10 points per question.
eventDetail.challengeTypePhotoBody: Invite guests to capture the best moments and earn 5 points per photo.
eventDetail.createQuizSuggestion2: What song will open the dance floor?
eventDetail.createQuizSuggestion3: What gift would the couple love most?
eventDetail.createQuizCreateInvalid: Each challenge must have 2 to 4 options and one correct answer.
eventDetail.createQuizCreateError: Could not create challenge. Try again.
eventDetail.createQuizQuestionLabel: Add a question for your guests
eventDetail.createPhotoCreateInvalid: Add at least one photo challenge.
eventDetail.createPhotoCreateError: Could not create challenges. Try again.
eventDetail.challengesGuestIntro: Hosts have set different challenges for guests to solve — join in!
eventDetail.challengesHostIntro: Guests will see these challenges and can complete them; here you manage what you offer at your event.
eventDetail.hostEmptyA11y: 0 challenges. You have no challenges created
eventDetail.rankingIntro: Solve as many challenges as you can to climb the guest leaderboard.
eventDetail.rankingHostEmpty: Here you'll see your top-scoring guests on your challenges.

challenges.photoIntroDefault:
Take a photo
for the
event.
challenges.cameraPermissionBody: We need camera access for this challenge.
challenges.webCameraLimited: On the web the preview may be limited; use iOS or Android for the camera and gallery.
challenges.galleryPermissionMessage: To choose a photo from your gallery we need access to your photos.
challenges.photoInfoCameraBody: Take a photo that meets the prompt. You can use the flash, switch cameras, or pick an image from your gallery.
challenges.photoInfoPreviewBody: Review the photo and tap “Add photo” to publish it to the event.

quiz.unavailable: This challenge could not be loaded. Go back to the list and try again.

stories.noStories: There are no stories for this event.

map.noLocation: There is no location for this event.

verify.expiredCode: This code has expired. Request a new one.
verify.codeAlreadyUsed: This code was already used. Request a new one.
verify.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
verify.serverOrNetwork: We couldn't complete verification. Check your connection and try again.
verify.unknown: We couldn't verify the code. Try again.
